result: If I had the ability to change the world in one pivotal way, I would ensure that every person has access to a high-quality, caring education—one that nourishes curiosity, empathy, and critical thinking. A truly transformative education system would empower individuals not just with knowledge, but with the tools to understand each other, solve problems creatively, and work together across differences. In the long term, I believe that awareness, empathy, and shared understanding are the soil where almost every other positive change can take root.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
